differential_diagnoses: Common variable immunodeficiency (CVID) with associated enteropathy and refractory giardiasis
Enteropathy-associated T-cell lymphoma (EATL) or peripheral T-cell lymphoma
Crohn's disease with secondary intestinal failure
B-cell lymphoproliferative disorder (arising from clonal NK/lymphoid cells)
Small-bowel adenocarcinoma in the setting of chronic inflammation
next_steps: Surgical consultation for emergent evaluation of symptomatic jejunal aneurysmal dilatation and suspected ischemia
Surgical resection of the affected jejunal segments with pathologic examination and flow cytometry for malignancy
Complete immunological workup for CVID, including specific antibody responses to protein and polysaccharide vaccines
Repeat endoscopic sampling of jejunal mucosa if surgery is delayed, including T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement studies
Infectious disease consultation for long-term suppressive therapy for giardiasis in the setting of hypogammaglobulinemia
